# Step 17: 差异通路活性

## 17.1 pathway activity 矩阵与差异结果

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("17_pathway_activity")

if (!file.exists(cache_15_splicing_state_path)) {
  stop("缺少 splicing 状态缓存: ", cache_15_splicing_state_path, "。请先运行模块 15。")
}
if (!file.exists(cache_16_immune_state_path)) {
  stop("缺少免疫状态缓存: ", cache_16_immune_state_path, "。请先运行模块 16。")
}

splicing_state <- readRDS(cache_15_splicing_state_path)
immune_state <- readRDS(cache_16_immune_state_path)

required_splicing_fields <- c(
  "as_gene_priority",
  "as_gene_membership",
  "dsfa_sig_ids",
  "deu_sig_ids",
  "isoform_sig_ids",
  "apa_sig_ids",
  "der_sig_ids",
  "top_as_candidates"
)
missing_splicing_fields <- setdiff(required_splicing_fields, names(splicing_state))
if (length(missing_splicing_fields) > 0) {
  stop("splicing 状态缓存缺少字段: ", paste(missing_splicing_fields, collapse = ", "), "。缓存文件: ", cache_15_splicing_state_path)
}

required_immune_fields <- c("immune_score_long", "immune_rank_tbl")
missing_immune_fields <- setdiff(required_immune_fields, names(immune_state))
if (length(missing_immune_fields) > 0) {
  stop("免疫状态缓存缺少字段: ", paste(missing_immune_fields, collapse = ", "), "。缓存文件: ", cache_16_immune_state_path)
}

as_gene_priority <- splicing_state$as_gene_priority %||% data.frame()
as_gene_membership <- splicing_state$as_gene_membership %||% data.frame()
dsfa_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(splicing_state$dsfa_sig_ids %||% character(0)))
deu_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(splicing_state$deu_sig_ids %||% character(0)))
isoform_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(splicing_state$isoform_sig_ids %||% character(0)))
apa_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(splicing_state$apa_sig_ids %||% character(0)))
der_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(splicing_state$der_sig_ids %||% character(0)))
top_as_candidates <- splicing_state$top_as_candidates %||% data.frame()

dsfa_gene_burden <- splicing_state$dsfa_gene_burden %||% data.frame()
apa_gene_summary_tbl <- splicing_state$apa_gene_summary_tbl %||% data.frame()
der_gene_summary_tbl <- splicing_state$der_gene_summary_tbl %||% data.frame()

if (nrow(apa_gene_summary_tbl) == 0) {
  apa_summary_file <- file.path(step11_dir, "13_3_APA_gene_summary.csv")
  if (file.exists(apa_summary_file)) {
    apa_gene_summary_tbl <- read.csv(apa_summary_file, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }
}
if (nrow(der_gene_summary_tbl) == 0) {
  der_summary_file <- file.path(step13_dir, "14_3_DER_gene_summary.csv")
  if (file.exists(der_summary_file)) {
    der_gene_summary_tbl <- read.csv(der_summary_file, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }
}

immune_score_long <- immune_state$immune_score_long %||% data.frame()
immune_rank_tbl <- immune_state$immune_rank_tbl %||% data.frame()

if (nrow(immune_score_long) == 0 || nrow(immune_rank_tbl) == 0) {
  stop("免疫状态缓存为空，无法继续模块 16。请先确认模块 16 成功生成有效缓存。")
}

ensure_membership_columns <- function(tbl) {
  if (!is.data.frame(tbl)) {
    tbl <- data.frame()
  }
  if (!"gene_id_clean" %in% colnames(tbl)) {
    tbl$gene_id_clean <- character(nrow(tbl))
  }
  for (flag_col in c("DE", "DAS", "DEU", "IS", "APA", "DER", "DSFA")) {
    if (!flag_col %in% colnames(tbl)) {
      tbl[[flag_col]] <- FALSE
    }
  }
  tbl
}
as_gene_membership <- ensure_membership_columns(as_gene_membership)

pathway_expr_mat <- make_gene_symbol_matrix(log2(gene_exp + 1), de_result)
if (nrow(pathway_expr_mat) < 100 || ncol(pathway_expr_mat) < 4) {
  stop("差异通路活性分析所需的 symbol-level 表达矩阵不足，请检查 Step 4 注释结果。")
}

empty_activity_matrix <- function() {
  matrix(
    numeric(0),
    nrow = 0,
    ncol = ncol(pathway_expr_mat),
    dimnames = list(character(0), colnames(pathway_expr_mat))
  )
}

write_activity_matrix <- function(mat, path) {
  if (is.null(mat)) {
    mat <- empty_activity_matrix()
  }
  if (is.null(colnames(mat))) {
    colnames(mat) <- colnames(pathway_expr_mat)
  }
  write.table(mat, path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA)
}

empty_activity_diff <- function() {
  data.frame(
    pathway = character(),
    logFC = numeric(),
    AveExpr = numeric(),
    t = numeric(),
    P.Value = numeric(),
    adj.P.Val = numeric(),
    B = numeric(),
    family = character(),
    significant = logical(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

run_activity_diff <- function(activity_mat, family_label) {
  diff_tbl <- run_limma_contrast_table(activity_mat, pathway_group_factor, group1_label, group2_label)
  if (nrow(diff_tbl) == 0) {
    out <- empty_activity_diff()
    out$family <- character(0)
    return(out)
  }
  diff_tbl %>%
    rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    mutate(
      family = family_label,
      significant = !is.na(P.Value) & P.Value < 0.05
    ) %>%
    arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)))
}

build_msig_symbol_sets <- function(collection, subcollection = NULL) {
  formals_now <- names(formals(msigdbr::msigdbr))
  db_species <- "HS"
  subcollection_options <- if (is.null(subcollection)) list(NULL) else as.list(subcollection)
  last_error <- NULL

  for (one_subcollection in subcollection_options) {
    msig_tbl <- tryCatch({
      if ("collection" %in% formals_now) {
        call_args <- list(db_species = db_species, species = msigdb_species, collection = collection)
        if (!is.null(one_subcollection) && !is.na(one_subcollection)) {
          call_args$subcollection <- one_subcollection
        }
        do.call(msigdbr::msigdbr, call_args)
      } else {
        call_args <- list(species = msigdb_species, category = collection)
        if (!is.null(one_subcollection) && !is.na(one_subcollection)) {
          call_args$subcategory <- one_subcollection
        }
        do.call(msigdbr::msigdbr, call_args)
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      last_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
      data.frame()
    })

    if (nrow(msig_tbl) > 0 && all(c("gene_symbol", "gs_name") %in% colnames(msig_tbl))) {
      return(split(msig_tbl$gene_symbol, msig_tbl$gs_name))
    }
  }

  message(
    "[17_pathway_activity] 未能获取 MSigDB collection=", collection,
    if (!is.null(subcollection)) paste0(" subcollection=", paste(unlist(subcollection), collapse = "/")) else "",
    if (!is.null(last_error)) paste0("；最后错误: ", last_error) else ""
  )
  list()
}

hallmark_sets <- build_msig_symbol_sets("H")
kegg_sets_activity <- build_msig_symbol_sets("C2", c("CP:KEGG", "CP:KEGG_LEGACY", "CP:KEGG_MEDICUS"))
reactome_sets_activity <- build_msig_symbol_sets("C2", "CP:REACTOME")

hallmark_activity <- run_ssgsea_matrix(pathway_expr_mat, hallmark_sets, min_size = 5, max_size = 500)
kegg_activity <- run_ssgsea_matrix(pathway_expr_mat, kegg_sets_activity, min_size = 5, max_size = 500)
reactome_activity <- run_ssgsea_matrix(pathway_expr_mat, reactome_sets_activity, min_size = 5, max_size = 500)

pathway_group_factor <- factor(sample_info[colnames(pathway_expr_mat), "group"], levels = c(group1_label, group2_label))

hallmark_activity_diff <- run_activity_diff(hallmark_activity, "Hallmark")
kegg_activity_diff <- run_activity_diff(kegg_activity, "KEGG")
reactome_activity_diff <- run_activity_diff(reactome_activity, "Reactome")

write_activity_matrix(hallmark_activity, file.path(step14_dir, "17_1_Hallmark_activity_matrix.tsv"))
write_activity_matrix(kegg_activity, file.path(step14_dir, "17_2_KEGG_activity_matrix.tsv"))
write_activity_matrix(reactome_activity, file.path(step14_dir, "17_3_Reactome_activity_matrix.tsv"))
write.csv(hallmark_activity_diff, file.path(step14_dir, "17_4_Hallmark_activity_differential.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(kegg_activity_diff, file.path(step14_dir, "17_5_KEGG_activity_differential.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(reactome_activity_diff, file.path(step14_dir, "17_6_Reactome_activity_differential.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

pathway_leading_summary <- bind_rows(hallmark_activity_diff, kegg_activity_diff, reactome_activity_diff) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, paste0("higher_in_", group2_label), paste0("higher_in_", group1_label))) %>%
  group_by(family) %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  ungroup()
write.csv(pathway_leading_summary, file.path(step14_dir, "17_7_leading_pathway_activity_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## 17.2 pathway activity 图表

```{r}
top_pathway_names <- unique(c(
  hallmark_activity_diff$pathway[seq_len(min(6, nrow(hallmark_activity_diff)))],
  kegg_activity_diff$pathway[seq_len(min(6, nrow(kegg_activity_diff)))],
  reactome_activity_diff$pathway[seq_len(min(6, nrow(reactome_activity_diff)))]
))
activity_heatmap_mat <- rbind(
  hallmark_activity[rownames(hallmark_activity) %in% top_pathway_names, , drop = FALSE],
  kegg_activity[rownames(kegg_activity) %in% top_pathway_names, , drop = FALSE],
  reactome_activity[rownames(reactome_activity) %in% top_pathway_names, , drop = FALSE]
)
if (nrow(activity_heatmap_mat) >= 2) {
  activity_heatmap_scaled <- safe_scale_rows(activity_heatmap_mat)
  save_base_pdf_versions(
    primary = file.path(step14_dir, "17_8_pathway_activity_heatmap.pdf"),
    width = 9,
    height = 10,
    expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
      ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
        activity_heatmap_scaled,
        name = "z-score",
        col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(activity_heatmap_scaled),
        top_annotation = heatmap_group_annotation(sample_info$group),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        column_names_rot = 45
      )
    )
  )
}

pathway_rank_plot_tbl <- bind_rows(hallmark_activity_diff, kegg_activity_diff, reactome_activity_diff) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, paste0("higher_in_", group2_label), paste0("higher_in_", group1_label))) %>%
  group_by(family, direction) %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(pathway_label = factor(paste(family, pathway, sep = " | "), levels = rev(unique(paste(family, pathway, sep = " | ")))))

pathway_rank_plot <- ggplot(pathway_rank_plot_tbl, aes(x = pathway_label, y = logFC, fill = family)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Top activated / suppressed pathway activities", x = NULL, y = paste0(group2_label, " - ", group1_label, " logFC")) +
  theme_rnaseq_minimal()
save_plot_versions(pathway_rank_plot, file.path(step14_dir, "17_9_pathway_activity_barplot.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)

activity_to_long <- function(activity_mat, family_label) {
  if (is.null(activity_mat) || nrow(activity_mat) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(pathway = character(), sample = character(), score = numeric(), family = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  }
  as.data.frame(activity_mat, check.names = FALSE) %>%
    rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    pivot_longer(-pathway, names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    mutate(family = family_label)
}

pathway_score_long <- bind_rows(
  activity_to_long(hallmark_activity, "Hallmark"),
  activity_to_long(kegg_activity, "KEGG"),
  activity_to_long(reactome_activity, "Reactome")
) %>%
  mutate(group = sample_info[sample, "group"]) %>%
  semi_join(pathway_rank_plot_tbl %>% dplyr::select(family, pathway), by = c("family", "pathway"))

if (nrow(pathway_score_long) > 0) {
  pathway_boxplot <- ggplot(pathway_score_long, aes(x = group, y = score, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.18, outlier.size = 0.3, fill = viz_pal$neutral["light"]) +
    facet_grid(family ~ pathway, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    labs(title = "Top differential pathway activity scores", x = NULL, y = "Pathway activity score") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw(base_size = viz_style$compact_size) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  save_plot_versions(pathway_boxplot, file.path(step14_dir, "17_10_pathway_activity_boxplots.pdf"), width = 13, height = 8.5)
}

empty_gsea_activity_tbl <- function() {
  data.frame(key = character(), family = character(), gsea_NES = numeric(), gsea_pvalue = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

make_gsea_activity_tbl <- function(gsea_tbl, family_label) {
  gsea_tbl <- make_result_df(gsea_tbl)
  if (nrow(gsea_tbl) == 0 || !"NES" %in% colnames(gsea_tbl) || !"pvalue" %in% colnames(gsea_tbl)) {
    return(empty_gsea_activity_tbl())
  }
  id_col <- if ("Description" %in% colnames(gsea_tbl)) {
    "Description"
  } else if ("ID" %in% colnames(gsea_tbl)) {
    "ID"
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
  if (is.na(id_col)) {
    return(empty_gsea_activity_tbl())
  }
  data.frame(
    key = sanitize_pathway_key(gsea_tbl[[id_col]]),
    family = family_label,
    gsea_NES = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(gsea_tbl$NES)),
    gsea_pvalue = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(gsea_tbl$pvalue)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

gsea_consistency_tbl <- bind_rows(
  hallmark_activity_diff %>% mutate(key = sanitize_pathway_key(pathway), family = "Hallmark"),
  kegg_activity_diff %>% mutate(key = sanitize_pathway_key(pathway), family = "KEGG"),
  reactome_activity_diff %>% mutate(key = sanitize_pathway_key(pathway), family = "Reactome")
) %>%
  left_join(
    bind_rows(
      make_gsea_activity_tbl(gsea_hallmark_df, "Hallmark"),
      make_gsea_activity_tbl(gsea_kegg, "KEGG"),
      make_gsea_activity_tbl(gsea_reactome_df, "Reactome")
    ),
    by = c("key", "family")
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(gsea_NES))
write.csv(gsea_consistency_tbl, file.path(step14_dir, "17_11_activity_vs_GSEA_consistency.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(gsea_consistency_tbl) > 0) {
  gsea_consistency_plot <- ggplot(gsea_consistency_tbl, aes(x = logFC, y = gsea_NES, color = family)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    scale_color_manual(values = resolve_enrichment_category_colors(gsea_consistency_tbl$family, "GSEA")) +
    labs(title = "Pathway activity vs Step7 GSEA consistency", x = "Activity logFC", y = "GSEA NES") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(gsea_consistency_plot, file.path(step14_dir, "17_12_activity_vs_GSEA_consistency_scatter.pdf"), width = 8, height = 6)
}
```

## 17.3 多证据整合与模块层汇总

```{r}
full_membership_tbl <- as_gene_membership %>%
  mutate(
    DSFA = gene_id_clean %in% dsfa_sig_ids,
    APA = dplyr::coalesce(APA, gene_id_clean %in% apa_sig_ids, FALSE),
    DER = dplyr::coalesce(DER, gene_id_clean %in% der_sig_ids, FALSE)
  ) %>%
  distinct(gene_id_clean, .keep_all = TRUE)
write.csv(full_membership_tbl, file.path(step14_dir, "17_13_gene_level_membership_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

build_membership_upset(
  full_membership_tbl,
  c("DE", "DAS", "DSFA", "APA", "DER"),
  file.path(step14_dir, "17_14_DE_DAS_DSFA_APA_DER_upset.pdf"),
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)

effect_summary_long <- bind_rows(
  {
    make_effect_tbl <- function(tbl, method_label, effect_col) {
      if (!is.data.frame(tbl) || nrow(tbl) == 0 || !"gene_id_clean" %in% colnames(tbl) || !effect_col %in% colnames(tbl)) {
        return(data.frame(gene_id_clean = character(), gene_label = character(), method = character(), effect_size = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
      }
      gene_label_vec <- if ("gene_label" %in% colnames(tbl)) tbl$gene_label else tbl$gene_id_clean
      data.frame(
        gene_id_clean = tbl$gene_id_clean,
        gene_label = dplyr::coalesce(gene_label_vec, tbl$gene_id_clean),
        method = method_label,
        effect_size = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(tbl[[effect_col]])),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    bind_rows(
      make_effect_tbl(as_gene_priority, "DAS", "max_abs_delta_psi"),
      make_effect_tbl(dsfa_gene_burden, "DSFA", "max_abs_freq_diff"),
      make_effect_tbl(apa_gene_summary_tbl, "APA", "max_abs_delta_PAU"),
      make_effect_tbl(der_gene_summary_tbl, "DER", "max_abs_der_effect")
    )
  }
) %>%
  left_join(
    de_result %>%
      transmute(gene_id_clean = ensembl_id, de_log2FoldChange = log2FoldChange, de_pvalue = pvalue),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(de_log2FoldChange), is.finite(effect_size))
write.csv(effect_summary_long, file.path(step14_dir, "17_15_joint_effect_summary_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(effect_summary_long) > 0) {
  joint_effect_plot <- ggplot(effect_summary_long, aes(x = de_log2FoldChange, y = effect_size, color = method)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 1.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ method, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(values = resolve_named_colors(c(viz_pal$group, viz_pal$accent), effect_summary_long$method)) +
    labs(title = "DE log2FC vs RNA processing effect size", x = "Gene log2FC", y = "Effect size") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(joint_effect_plot, file.path(step14_dir, "17_16_joint_effect_scatter.pdf"), width = 11, height = 6)
}

if (nrow(module_df_annotated) > 0 && nrow(module_trait_tbl) > 0) {
  module_apa_enrichment <- save_module_target_enrichment(
    module_df_annotated,
    module_trait_tbl,
    apa_sig_ids,
    "APA",
    file.path(step14_dir, "17_17_Module_APA_Enrichment.csv"),
    file.path(step14_dir, "17_18_Module_APA_Enrichment_Bubble.pdf"),
    viz_pal$accent["green"]
  )
  module_der_enrichment <- save_module_target_enrichment(
    module_df_annotated,
    module_trait_tbl,
    der_sig_ids,
    "DER",
    file.path(step14_dir, "17_19_Module_DER_Enrichment.csv"),
    file.path(step14_dir, "17_20_Module_DER_Enrichment_Bubble.pdf"),
    viz_pal$accent["purple"]
  )

  module_evidence_summary_6way <- module_df_annotated %>%
    mutate(gene_id_clean = ensembl_id) %>%
    left_join(full_membership_tbl, by = "gene_id_clean") %>%
    mutate(
      DE = dplyr::coalesce(DE, FALSE),
      DAS = dplyr::coalesce(DAS, FALSE),
      DEU = dplyr::coalesce(DEU, FALSE),
      IS = dplyr::coalesce(IS, FALSE),
      APA = dplyr::coalesce(APA, FALSE),
      DER = dplyr::coalesce(DER, FALSE)
    ) %>%
    group_by(module_label) %>%
    summarise(
      module_size = n(),
      de_genes = sum(DE, na.rm = TRUE),
      das_genes = sum(DAS, na.rm = TRUE),
      deu_genes = sum(DEU, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_genes = sum(IS, na.rm = TRUE),
      apa_genes = sum(APA, na.rm = TRUE),
      der_genes = sum(DER, na.rm = TRUE),
      multi_evidence_genes = sum((DE + DAS + DEU + IS + APA + DER) >= 2, na.rm = TRUE),
      high_support_genes = sum((DE + DAS + DEU + IS + APA + DER) >= 3, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(module_trait_tbl %>% dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation), by = c("module_label" = "Module")) %>%
    arrange(desc(multi_evidence_genes), desc(high_support_genes), desc(abs(module_trait_correlation)))
  write.csv(module_evidence_summary_6way, file.path(step14_dir, "17_21_Module_MultiEvidence_Summary_6way.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

  module_evidence_long_6way <- module_evidence_summary_6way %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(de_genes, das_genes, deu_genes, is_genes, apa_genes, der_genes, multi_evidence_genes, high_support_genes), names_to = "evidence_type", values_to = "gene_count")
  module_evidence_bubble_6way <- ggplot(module_evidence_long_6way, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(module_label, module_trait_correlation), size = gene_count, color = evidence_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    labs(title = "Module multi-evidence summary (DE/DAS/DEU/IS/APA/DER)", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "Gene count", color = "Evidence") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(module_evidence_bubble_6way, file.path(step14_dir, "17_22_Module_MultiEvidence_Bubble_6way.pdf"), width = 9.5, height = max(5, 0.8 * nrow(module_evidence_summary_6way)))

  module_evidence_heatmap_6way <- module_evidence_summary_6way %>%
    dplyr::select(de_genes, das_genes, deu_genes, is_genes, apa_genes, der_genes, multi_evidence_genes, high_support_genes, module_trait_correlation) %>%
    as.matrix()
  rownames(module_evidence_heatmap_6way) <- module_evidence_summary_6way$module_label
  module_evidence_heatmap_6way <- scale(module_evidence_heatmap_6way)
  module_evidence_heatmap_6way[!is.finite(module_evidence_heatmap_6way)] <- 0
  save_base_pdf_versions(
    primary = file.path(step14_dir, "17_23_Module_MultiEvidence_Heatmap_6way.pdf"),
    width = 8.5,
    height = max(5, 0.5 * nrow(module_evidence_summary_6way) + 2),
    expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
      ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
        module_evidence_heatmap_6way,
        name = "z-score",
        col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(module_evidence_heatmap_6way),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_names_rot = 45
      )
    )
  )

  if (exists("me_df") && is.data.frame(me_df) && nrow(me_df) > 0) {
    top_immune_for_module <- immune_rank_tbl %>% slice_head(n = min(8, nrow(immune_rank_tbl)))
    immune_score_wide <- immune_score_long %>%
      semi_join(top_immune_for_module %>% dplyr::select(method, cell_type), by = c("method", "cell_type")) %>%
      mutate(feature = paste(method, cell_type, sep = " | ")) %>%
      dplyr::select(feature, sample, score) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = score) %>%
      as.data.frame()
    if (nrow(immune_score_wide) > 0) {
      rownames(immune_score_wide) <- immune_score_wide$feature
      immune_score_wide$feature <- NULL
      module_me_tbl <- me_df[match(colnames(immune_score_wide), me_df$sample), grepl("^Module_", names(me_df)), drop = FALSE]
      rownames(module_me_tbl) <- colnames(immune_score_wide)
      module_immune_cor <- cor(t(as.matrix(immune_score_wide)), as.matrix(module_me_tbl), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
      write.csv(module_immune_cor, file.path(step14_dir, "17_24_Module_Immune_Correlation.csv"))
    }

    pathway_score_wide <- pathway_score_long %>%
      semi_join(pathway_rank_plot_tbl %>% dplyr::select(family, pathway), by = c("family", "pathway")) %>%
      mutate(feature = paste(family, pathway, sep = " | ")) %>%
      dplyr::select(feature, sample, score) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = score) %>%
      as.data.frame()
    if (nrow(pathway_score_wide) > 0) {
      rownames(pathway_score_wide) <- pathway_score_wide$feature
      pathway_score_wide$feature <- NULL
      module_me_tbl <- me_df[match(colnames(pathway_score_wide), me_df$sample), grepl("^Module_", names(me_df)), drop = FALSE]
      rownames(module_me_tbl) <- colnames(pathway_score_wide)
      module_pathway_cor <- cor(t(as.matrix(pathway_score_wide)), as.matrix(module_me_tbl), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
      write.csv(module_pathway_cor, file.path(step14_dir, "17_25_Module_Pathway_Correlation.csv"))
    }
  }
}
```
